children.label: D
children.text: Part A or B of subchapter IV.

children.heading: Notification
children.label: 2 Notification
children.text: An eligible local educational agency shall notify the State educational agency of the local educational agency’s intention to use the applicable funding in accordance with paragraph (1), by a date that is established by the State educational agency for the notification.

children.label: I
children.text: the total number of students in average daily attendance at all of the schools served by the local educational agency is fewer than 600; or

children.label: II
children.text: each county in which a school served by the local educational agency is located has a total population density of fewer than 10 persons per square mile; and

children.label: ii
children.text: all of the schools served by the local educational agency are designated with a locale code of 41, 42, or 43, as determined by the Secretary;

children.label: B
children.text: the agency meets the criteria established in subparagraph (A)(i) and the Secretary, in accordance with paragraph (2), grants the local educational agency’s request to waive the criteria described in subparagraph (A)(ii); or

children.label: C
children.text: the local educational agency is a member of an educational service agency that does not receive funds under this subpart and the local educational agency meets the requirements of this part.

children.heading: Certification
children.label: 2 Certification
children.text: The Secretary shall determine whether to waive the criteria described in paragraph (1)(A)(ii) based on a demonstration by the local educational agency, and concurrence by the State educational agency, that the local educational agency is located in an area defined as rural by a governmental agency of the State.

children.heading: Disbursement
children.label: d Disbursement
children.text: Each State educational agency that receives applicable funding for a fiscal year shall disburse the applicable funding to local educational agencies for alternative uses under this section for the fiscal year at the same time as the State educational agency disburses the applicable funding to local educational agencies that do not intend to use the applicable funding for such alternative uses for the fiscal year.

children.heading: Applicable rules
children.label: e Applicable rules
children.text: Applicable funding under this section shall be available to carry out local activities authorized under subsection (a).
